changes: Added tw- utilities to wh40k-dice-summary className (tw-mt-2 tw-p-2 tw-bg-[var(--wh40k-panel-bg-translucent)] tw-rounded-md tw-text-[0.85rem] tw-leading-relaxed)
Added tw- utilities to wh40k-dice-target className (tw-text-[var(--wh40k-text-muted)] tw-font-medium)
Added tw- utilities to wh40k-dice-fumble className (tw-text-[var(--wh40k-red-bright)] tw-font-bold tw-[text-shadow:0_0_6px_rgba(255,68,68,0.5)])
Added tw- utilities to wh40k-message-portrait className (tw-w-7 tw-h-7 tw-object-cover tw-rounded-full tw-border-2 tw-border-gold tw-mr-2 tw-shadow-[0_2px_4px_var(--wh40k-shadow-medium)])
Removed legacy wh40k-roll-card__value--negative class (already covered by tw-text-failure)
Removed legacy wh40k-roll-card__value--negative class (already covered by tw-text-[var(--wh40k-danger-secondary)])
Added safelist entries for all JS-injected tw- utilities: dice summary, dice target, dice fumble, message portrait

dead_code.wh40k-item-card__*: All wh40k-item-card__ classes were dead code — item-card-chat.hbs is fully ported to tw- utilities already. No template referenced any wh40k-item-card__ BEM class.
dead_code.wh40k-roll-card__*: All wh40k-roll-card__ classes (except value--negative) were dead code — roll-card-shell.hbs, action-roll-chat.hbs, damage-roll-chat.hbs and all other chat templates are fully ported to tw- utilities.
dead_code.#chat-log .message.flexcol dark-mode-ove: Dark mode overrides using nested :is() selectors were dead code — chat messages get the wh40k-rpg class via renderChatMessageHTML hook and the theme variables handle dark mode via CSS custom properties.
dead_code.wh40k-chat: Not used in any template — dead code.
dead_code.wh40k-roll-card__qualities/wh40k-quality: wh40k-quality-tag is used only in item-ammo-sheet.hbs (non-chat), with tw- utilities alongside it.

ratchet_results.css:ratchet: PASS — tw-only=129 mixed=115 css-only=0 (unchanged, chat templates were already classified tailwind-only or not classified)
ratchet_results.animation:ratchet: PASS — no animation rules in deleted blocks

notes: roll-card-shell.hbs was already fully ported to tw- utilities before this task.
item-card-chat.hbs was already fully ported to tw- utilities before this task.
action-roll-chat.hbs, damage-roll-chat.hbs and all other chat roll templates were already fully ported.
The wh40k-dice-* and wh40k-degree-badge classes are JS hook classes kept for querySelector targeting; tw- utilities now cover their visual styles.
wh40k-message-portrait is a JS hook class kept for duplicate-prevention check; tw- utilities now cover its visual styles.
